canonical_definition: The Moral Foundations Reddit Corpus (MFRC) is characterized in the provided literature as a dataset of English-language Reddit posts. The corpus is consistently described as containing 16,123 posts sourced from 12 subreddits. One line of description focuses on the content domains, categorizing the posts into "US politics, French politics, and everyday moral life" ("InSerter: Speech Instruction Following with Unsupervised Interleaved Pre-training"). A complementary description frames MFRC as a "multi-label moral foundation corpus" annotated for six moral foundations, with each sample reviewed by three annotators ("REARANK: Reasoning Re-ranking Agent via Reinforcement Learning"). This latter work specifies that the dataset is used for "evaluating subjective multi-label classification and distribution alignment."
papers: Around the World in 24 Hours: ProbingLLMKnowledge of Time and Place
InSerter: Speech Instruction Following with Unsupervised Interleaved Pre-training
Beyond the Score: Uncertainty-CalibratedLLMs for Automated Essay Assessment
No Need for Explanations:LLMs can implicitly learn from mistakes in-context
REARANK: Reasoning Re-ranking Agent via Reinforcement Learning

definitions.text: The Moral Foundations Reddit Corpus, a dataset of 16,123 English Reddit posts from 12 subreddits, categorized into US politics, French politics, and everyday moral life.
definitions.paper: InSerter: Speech Instruction Following with Unsupervised Interleaved Pre-training
